title: Echinospermum spinocarpos
taxonomy: Echinospermum spinocarpos is a genus of flowering plants in the family Menispermaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as moonseed or menispermaceae. This family is part of the larger order Ranunculales, which includes a variety of flowering plants. The Menispermaceae family is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions, with a few species extending into temperate areas. Echinospermum spinocarpos is native to Central America and South America. The classification of Echinospermum spinocarpos reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Ranunculales order.
